The fact that there is no checking account, due to lower financial strain, because it indicates stable financial habits, is known in the literature as a signal that decreases credit risk, and the model also identifies it as a factor that decreases risk. [1]
The fact that the account balance is negative, due to lower financial strain, because it indicates stable financial habits, is known in the literature as a signal that decreases credit risk, and the model also identifies it as a factor that decreases risk. [2]
The fact that employment duration is less than one year, due to limited income stability, because it indicates unstable financial habits, is known in the literature as a signal that increases credit risk, and the model also identifies it as a factor that increases risk. [3]
Overall, this applicant is likely to have a low risk of default.
